title: XTTS Local Settings
description: XTTS Local is the built-in voice engine. It uses your Studio voice profiles for verification, and it needs the Studio XTTS environment plus the Python packages listed in its requirements before it can be enabled.

speed.title: Speed
speed.description: Synthesis speed multiplier. Values below 1.0 slow down speech; values above 1.0 speed it up.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: Sampling temperature for the XTTS model. Lower values produce more deterministic output.

repetition_penalty.title: Repetition Penalty
repetition_penalty.description: Penalty applied to repeated tokens. Increase to reduce repetitive output.

top_k.title: Top-K
top_k.description: Number of highest-probability tokens to consider during sampling.

top_p.title: Top-P
top_p.description: Cumulative probability cutoff for nucleus sampling.

safe_mode.title: Safe Mode
safe_mode.description: Enable safe mode to prevent potential crashes on problematic inputs.

x-ui.summary: XTTS Local stays on your machine, but it still needs the Studio XTTS runtime and any Python packages listed by the engine before it can be turned on. If the card says needs setup, click Install Deps to install the required packages, then verify the engine again using the Default Voice from General settings.
